content.text: I design and build **accessible, responsive web applications** using **React**, **TypeScript**, and **Figma**. With a background spanning both visual design and front-end development, I bridge the gap between creativity and code — crafting clean, performant, and visually compelling interfaces.

I'm deeply experienced in **accessibility**, **usability testing**, and **component-driven design systems**, and I’m passionate about delivering intuitive user experiences that combine elegant design with reliable engineering.

Experienced in **technical writing**, **design systems**, and **cross-functional collaboration**. Skilled communicator with a proven ability to translate complex ideas into actionable solutions and accessible interfaces.
• **Languages & Frameworks:** React, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3, SCSS, PHP, ASP
• **UI & Design Tools:** Figma, Adobe XD, Photoshop, Illustrator, Framer Motion, Material UI
• **Development Tools:** VS Code, Git, Node.js, NPM, Vite, Postman, Confluence, Jira
• **Systems:** Windows, Linux
• **Other:** Accessibility (WCAG 2.1), Responsive Design, Usability Testing, Agile, Technical Writing
• **Designed and built touchscreen and support apps** for senior living facilities using React and Material UI.
• **Created detailed Figma prototypes** and implemented accessible, inclusive interfaces for diverse user groups.
• **Ensured WCAG-compliant layouts**, optimized asset delivery, and improved performance across browsers.
• **Authored internal documentation and onboarding guides**, streamlining developer ramp-up time.
• **Led UI reviews and design consistency efforts** within Agile sprints.
• **Designed and developed Angular + TypeScript web tools** for enterprise data governance.
• **Built the Coperor Console app** with reusable UI components and accessible layouts.
• **Produced Adobe XD prototypes** and front-end style guidelines for engineering teams.
• **Recognized for leadership in UX accessibility and design standardization initiatives**.
• _Stack:_ Angular, TypeScript, Material UI, Adobe XD, Jira, Confluence, Agile

Prior to my front-end and design specialization, I worked across **web development, writing, and marketing** roles. This multidisciplinary background continues to shape my approach to building user-centered digital experiences.
• **Designed and developed websites and brand assets** for clients such as PSSC Labs, Ribbon, and Artizen HPC.
• **Delivered full-stack projects blending front-end design and custom CMS implementations**.
• **Developed and maintained the eTree website** for First American Document Solutions using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and ASP.
• **Built and maintained corporate intranet and public-facing websites** supporting multiple departments.
• **Authored technical documentation, internal guides, and marketing materials** to unify branding and product messaging.

**Bachelor of Arts, English**  
_University of California, Berkeley_  
1994
• UI/UX Design & Prototyping
• React Front-End Development
• Accessibility (WCAG / ADA / Section 508)
• Usability Testing & Iterative Design
• Technical Writing & Documentation
• Component-Driven Design Systems
• Responsive Layouts & CSS Architecture
• Agile Collaboration & Sprint Planning

I am committed to building applications that meet **WAI WCAG 2.1**, **Section 508**, and **ADA** standards for accessibility. My goal is to ensure that every product I design or develop can be used effectively by all people — regardless of ability or device.
